comment: Motive streaming convention: Z-up, right-handed. World: Z-up, RH; +X forward, +Y left, +Z up. Transform is yaw + translation only.
notes: Motive has TWO independent Up Axis settings: display (View) and streaming. The streaming one is what matters for Redis. Verify at startup with Edit -> Application Settings -> Streaming -> Up Axis = Z.
Vertical residual is floor unevenness (~3.7 mm across the three markers), not noise.
If anyone flips streaming to Y-up, this calibration breaks silently. Re-solve or flip back.
